biological_replicate: in the presence of ZK002, the matrigel plugs were a light red or light yellow color compared with induction control, and neovascularization was almost completely attenuated.
experimental_design: in vivo and in vitro study design
the in vivo anti-angiogenic effects of ZK002 and the in vitro anti-inflammatory potential of ZK002.
factor_value: ZK002 exhibited anti-angiogenic activity in the HUVEC tube formation assay.
number_of_fractions: six peaks were identified in the eluate from anion-exchange columns.
